start.intro:
Welcome to intcode adventure.
To follow a path type "go <path>", for example "go north"
To take an item type "take <item>"
Other possible actions will be provided in [square brackets]
Please provide input in lower case.

crossroad.intro: You are standing in a tunnel system inside of a cave.\nExits are north, east, and west.\nThere is a dim light coming from the north.

dragon.intro: After following the path a short distance you can see the cave's exit just ahead.\nYour view of the exit is blocked by the large dragon sleeping in front of you.\nYou can try to sneak past the dragon and exit the cave to the north, [attack] the dragon, or return south the way you came.

dragon-fire.intro: Your attack bounces harmlessly off the dragon's scales.\nThe dragon wakes up and burns you to a crisp.

dragon-eaten.intro: You attempt to sneak by the dragon, but despite your best efforts your footfalls echo loudly off the walls.\nAlerted by the noise, the dragon wakes up and makes a quick meal out of you.

intro.text: You come across a chamber with debris strewn about the floor, most of which appears broken and useless.\nExits are east and south.
\nThere is a chest in the corner that catches your eye. You can try to [open chest]

ring-chest.intro: You open the chest and find a ring inside.\nAs you put it on your finger, you discover it must have magical powers, as your steps become nearly silent

escape.intro: Thanks to your magic ring you don't make a sound as you sneak past the dragon, which continues its slumber undisturbed\n\nCongratulations, you have escaped the cave and successfully completed this adventure.
